hero.title: Saba pulojekiti ey'okutuukirikika
hero.lead: IATF ekebera okusaba kwa pulojekiti z'okutuukirikika eziva ku bwetaavu obwa nnamaddala.
support: Tekikwetaagisa kunnyonnyola mu bulambulukufu ekizibu, ani akikutteeko, n'ensonga lwaki kikulu, kimala okutandika.

intro: Amakubo gonna gayingira mu kukebera kumu.

items.label: Omukutu gwa Intaneeti
items.body: Kozesa foomu eno wammanga okuwaayo okusaba okutegekeddwa obulungi.

items.label: E-mail yo
items.body: Tuma okusaba kwo butereevu ku: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ebintu ebiba bisabiddwa ku email biyinza okufuuka ebiwandiiko ebisabibwa mu lujjudde oluvannyuma lw'okubitunuulira n'okubirongoosa.

items.label: Obutakkaanya
items.body: Tandika awo bwekiba kyangu. Okusaba kukyagenda mu kwekenneenya kwe kumu.

guidance.title: Nga tonnaba kutuma bubaka
paragraphs: IATF ekola mu lujjudde. Ebiruubirirwa biyinza okukuŋŋaanyizibwa n'okufulumizibwa ng'ebiwandiiko by'ebiruubirirwa mu kitongole kya GitHub, ku mukutu guno, oba byombi.

Togattako mannya go ag'ekyama, ennamba z'essimu, obujjanjabi, oba okumanya ebikwata ku buli muntu akozesa tekinologiya akuyamba okuggyako nga kyetaagisa era ng'oli mukakafu nti IATF eyinza okukebera ebintu ebyo.
IATF eggyako ebintu by'omuntu eby'obwetaavu nga tennaba kufulumya biwandiiko by'okusaba.

review.title: Ebisuubirwa mu kwekenneenya
paragraphs: Okuweereza okusaba tekitegeeza nti okusaba kwo kujja kukkirizibwa.
IATF ekebera okusaba kw'okutuukiriza obuvunaanyizibwa, okusoboka, omugaso, n'okuba nti omulimu guli mu tterekero ly'ebitabo ly'abantu bonna.
Ebintu ebimu by'osaba biyinza okugaanwa, okuyimirizibwawo, oba okukyusibwa nga tebinnaba kukkirizibwa.

fields.name: Okumanya ebisingawo
fields.label: Obubaka bw'okuwuliziganya nabo
fields.helper: Endagiriro ya e-mail oba akawayiro ka Discord okusobola okugoberera.
fields.placeholder: Endagiriro ya e-mail oba akawayiro ka Discord

fields.name: ekizibu
fields.label: Kizibu ki ky'ogezaako okugonjoola?
fields.helper: Nnyonnyola ekizibu mu bigambo ebyangu okutegeera.

fields.name: extraEnnyiriri eziriraanyeewo
fields.label: Ensonga endala
fields.helper: Buulira ekintu ekirala kyonna ekiyamba okunnyonnyola obwetaavu: lwaki kikulu, eby'okulabirako, ebiwandiiko, ekirowoozo kya programu, oba obutakwata budde.

fields.name: openSourceConsent[kyusa _ edit source]
fields.label: Owulira bulungi n'enkulaakulana y'ebiwandiiko ebikubibwa mu lujjudde?
fields.helper: Pulojekiti ezikkiriziddwa z'ebiwandiiko ebikuumibwa mu lujjudde wansi wa IATF.

items: ekifo ekikuumibwa abantu bonna mu kitongole kya IATF GitHub
layisensi ya copyleft ku code n'ebikozesebwa mu pulojekiti

header.title: Okusaba okutonotono era okutegeerekeka obulungi kimala okutandika

paragraphs: Bw'oba olina obwetaavu obwenkukunala era ng'olowooza nti kirina okufuuka pulojekiti y'abantu bonna, butusindikire.
